page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Microbial pan-GWAS using the output from Roary
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Pan-genome wide association studies and  is designed to take the gene_presence_absence.csv file from roary as well as a traits file created by the user and calculate the assocations between all genes in the accessory genome (all genes that are present in i genomes where 1 < i < n) and the traits. it reports a list of genes sorted by strength of association per trait.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Pan-genome wide association studies and  is designed to take the gene_presence_absence.csv file from Roary as well as a traits file created by the user and calculate the assocations between all genes in the accessory genome (all genes that are present in i genomes where 1 < i < N) and the traits. It reports a list of genes sorted by strength of association per trait.

It reports a list of genes sorted by strength of association per trait.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Scoary calculates the assocations between all genes in the accessory genome and the traits.
